prompts.title: Study Sprint Post-Review Bug Fix Manager
prompts.sourceStep: Post-review bug fix manager
prompts.task: Execute CCP-600, CCP-601, CCP-602 in order to fix all bugs found during study sprint line-by-line review
prompts.queueSummary: Run CCP-600/601/602 — annotation Cancel bug, study navigation bug, glyph CSS positioning
prompts.notes: CCP-599 already completed. This manager covers the remaining 3 bugs found in the full line-by-line review.
manualChecklist: - [ ] Cancel button in comment panel does not save (CCP-600)
- [ ] Navigating between studies loads the correct study (CCP-601)
- [ ] Glyph quick-select appears over the board (CCP-602)
prompts.reviewScope: manager and descendants

prompts.title: Fix 3 post-review bugs: PGN data loss on auto-save, move-wrap layout regression, dead stub in libraryView
prompts.sourceStep: Post-review fixes
prompts.task: Fix persistStudy() PGN data loss, move-wrap display:contents layout fix, remove renderStudyDetail stub from libraryView.ts
prompts.queueSummary: Fix 3 bugs found in study sprint review: PGN data loss, move-wrap layout, dead stub
prompts.notes: Fixes issues found during post-sprint review. Primary fix target is CCP-541 (PGN data loss). Also fixes CCP-540 layout regression and CCP-532 dead code.
manualChecklist: - [ ] Open a study, add a comment and a glyph annotation to a move, navigate away and back — confirm comment and glyph are still present after reload
- [ ] Add an arrow shape on the board in study mode, save and reload — confirm arrow is preserved
- [ ] Open two different studies via #/study/A and #/study/B — confirm each shows the correct study (requires CCP-601 fix)
- [ ] Open analysis board, right-click a move, click Save to Library — confirm entry appears in #/study
- [ ] In move list with bookmarks enabled, verify bookmark buttons sit in the correct column position (no layout overflow from move-wrap)
prompts.reviewScope: leaf only

prompts.title: Fix annotation panel: Cancel saves instead of discards, wrong comment shown
prompts.sourceDocument: Line-by-line review of Study Sprint (CCP-534, CCP-535)
prompts.sourceStep: Post-review fixes
prompts.task: Fix blur/cancel race in comment panel and wrong comment display by index vs id
prompts.queueSummary: Cancel button saves instead of discards; comment panel shows wrong comment when node has multiple comments
prompts.notes: Found during line-by-line review. Bug 1: comments[0] should be find(c => c.id === 'user'). Bug 2: mousedown+preventDefault on Cancel to suppress blur→saveComment race.
manualChecklist: - [ ] Open a study, navigate to a move, click '+ Add comment', type text, click Cancel — confirm comment is NOT saved
- [ ] Add a comment to a move, save, reload study — confirm the correct comment text displays (not a PGN comment from another slot)
- [ ] Add a comment via Enter key — confirm it saves correctly
prompts.reviewScope: leaf only

prompts.title: Fix study detail: navigating between studies shows wrong study
prompts.sourceStep: Post-review fixes
prompts.task: Fix renderStudyDetail not reloading when study ID changes
prompts.queueSummary: Navigating from study A to study B leaves study A on screen — study B never loads
prompts.notes: Found during line-by-line review. renderStudyDetail only calls loadStudyDetail when !detailLoaded(), but never checks if the ID changed. Fix: add studyDetail()?.id !== id check.
manualChecklist: - [ ] Open #/study, open study A, navigate to #/study — confirm library loads
- [ ] From library, open study A, then click back and open study B — confirm study B's title and moves load (not study A's)
- [ ] Directly navigate to #/study/B after having viewed study A — confirm correct study appears
prompts.reviewScope: leaf only

prompts.title: Fix glyph quick-select CSS positioning: missing position:relative on board column
prompts.sourceStep: Post-review fixes
prompts.task: Add position:relative to .study-detail__board-col so glyph-quick-select absolute positioning works
prompts.queueSummary: Glyph quick-select popup appears at wrong position — board column missing position:relative
prompts.notes: Found during line-by-line review. .glyph-quick-select uses position:absolute but parent .study-detail__board-col has no position:relative.
manualChecklist: - [ ] Open a study, focus the board column, press ! or ? — confirm the glyph quick-select popup appears overlaid on the board area (not in a corner of the viewport or off-screen)
prompts.reviewScope: leaf only

prompts.title: Opening Classification Sprint Manager
prompts.sourceStep: Opening Classification Sprint — Manager
prompts.task: Execute the full Opening Classification sprint: create ECO classifier module, wire into imports, backfill existing games, add opening filter UI
prompts.queueSummary: Manager: execute CCP-515→516→517→518 for opening classification
prompts.notes: Manager for the Opening Classification sprint. Executes 4 child prompts in sequence.
manualChecklist: - [ ] Import a PGN via paste with no Opening/ECO headers — opening column shows classified name
- [ ] Import Lichess username games — all games have opening names
- [ ] Import Chess.com username games — all games have opening names
- [ ] Reload app — existing games that previously had no opening now show classified name
- [ ] Console shows 'Backfilled opening data for N games'
- [ ] Games tab has Opening filter input — typing 'Sicilian' filters correctly
- [ ] Typing 'B20' filters by ECO code
- [ ] Filter is case-insensitive
- [ ] npm run build passes
prompts.reviewScope: campaign sample validation

prompts.completionErrors: Pre-existing TS errors in src/study/studyDetailView.ts (unrelated to this prompt, existed before sprint)

- [ ] Type 'Sicilian' in the opening filter — confirm only Sicilian games show
- [ ] Type 'B20' in the opening filter — confirm only ECO B20 games show
- [ ] Filter is case-insensitive (try 'sicilian')
- [ ] Open browser DevTools Application tab, check IDB — confirm 'eco' and 'opening' indexes exist on 'games' store
- [ ] App loads without IDB errors after version upgrade
- [ ] npm run build passes
